title: code_quality score 0.667 indicates lint issues
evidence: scores.json code_quality=0.6667; verbose multi-line module docstrings in every file (e.g. server.py:1-24, knowledge_graph.py:1-31, data_loader.py:1-28) likely trigger style warnings
suggestion: Run ruff check and address reported issues; consider trimming module-level docstrings

title: maintainability score 0.288 — below average
evidence: scores.json maintainability=0.288; knowledge_graph.py is 609 lines with 14 methods; find_matches (knowledge_graph.py:163-217) has 9 filter branches in a single loop
suggestion: Extract filter logic into composable predicates; split knowledge_graph into query-category modules

title: test_coverage 0.94 — not 100%
